title: Phase Node
description: Graph node representing a workflow phase

id.description: Unique identifier for the graph node

row.description: The row this phase belongs to

cell.description: The column cell this node belongs to

phase_id.description: The identifier of the phase within the workflow

status.description: The execution status of the phase

prerequisites.description: List of phase IDs or gate IDs that must be satisfied before this phase can run

body_ref.description: Reference to the phase body definition (e.g., path to phase.md)

blocked_on_gate.description: The ID of the gate currently blocking this phase, if status is blocked
